name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: Another section of the metal-lined alien tunnel system. Three-way junction.
This connects the main tunnel hub to the rock rooms and the force field room.
W leads to the force field and control console - a critical endgame area.
S=metal tunnel hub (9). E=dimly lit rock room (23). W=force field room (29).
notes: Metal tunnel junction. S=tunnel hub (9). E=rock room (23). W=force field/console room (29). Key connector in alien complex.
